tagline: A Cozy Escape for Coffee & Artisanal Bakes

location.address: 5th Floor, Sno 270, Kno 256, Beml Layout, Kundalahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066

menu.name: Avocado & Poached Egg Tartine
menu.description: Sourdough toast topped with smashed avocado, feta cheese, chili flakes, and a perfectly poached egg.

menu.name: Classic Almond Croissant
menu.description: Buttery, flaky croissant filled with rich almond cream and topped with toasted almonds.

menu.name: New York Style Cheesecake
menu.description: Creamy, dense cheesecake with a graham cracker crust, served with a berry compote.

menu.name: Truffle Mushroom Pasta
menu.description: Fettuccine tossed in a creamy truffle sauce with roasted wild mushrooms and parmesan.

menu.name: Signature Hazelnut Latte
menu.description: Espresso with steamed milk and house-made roasted hazelnut syrup.

menu.name: Berry Basil Smoothie
menu.description: A refreshing blend of mixed berries, fresh basil, yogurt, and honey.

reviews.name: Ananya R.
reviews.text: The ambiance is absolutely stunning! Perfect place for a quiet work session or a coffee date. The almond croissant is a must-try.

reviews.name: Rahul K.
reviews.text: Best cheesecake in Kundalahalli. The staff is super friendly and the coffee is top-notch. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Meera S.
reviews.text: A hidden gem! Love the cozy decor and the extensive menu. The truffle pasta was delicious.
